task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the source video file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands referencing '/home/ga/Videos/source_clip.mp4' (e.g., ffmpeg input) or the file opened in a video editing application.

task_completion.description: Verify the output directory was created or accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands like 'mkdir -p /home/ga/Videos/aspect_ratios' or the folder visible in a file manager.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the cinemascope and academy flat videos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'cinemascope.mp4' and 'academy_flat.mp4' in the output directory, or terminal output showing ffmpeg/processing commands generating these specific files.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the classic TV, square social, and vertical mobile videos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'classic_tv.mp4', 'square_social.mp4', and 'vertical_mobile.mp4' in the output directory, or terminal output showing their generation.

task_completion.description: Verify the videos were encoded with the correct resolutions and codecs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (like ffmpeg arguments '-c:v libx264', '-c:a aac', and crop filters) or file property dialogs confirming H.264/AAC codecs and the specific target resolutions (e.g., 1920x804, 1920x1038, 1440x1080, 1080x1080, 608x1080).

task_completion.description: Verify the aspect catalog JSON file was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'aspect_catalog.json' visible in the output directory, or terminal commands/text editors showing the creation and editing of this file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually processed the videos rather than creating empty or fake files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine video processing commands (e.g., ffmpeg with crop filters) or GUI rendering progress, rather than 'touch' commands or simple file renaming.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent executed the task independently without downloading a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent typing out the ffmpeg commands, writing a script, or using a GUI manually, rather than downloading a script from the internet to do the work.

integrity.description: Ensure the catalog file was generated or written by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent writing the JSON content in a text editor or using a script to generate it, rather than copying it from an external unauthorized source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source video is located at /home/ga/Videos/source_clip.mp4. The output directory must be /home/ga/Videos/aspect_ratios/. The expected output files and their resolutions are: cinemascope.mp4 (1920x804), academy_flat.mp4 (1920x1038), classic_tv.mp4 (1440x1080), square_social.mp4 (1080x1080), and vertical_mobile.mp4 (608x1080). The videos must use the H.264 video codec and AAC audio codec. A catalog file named aspect_catalog.json must also be created in the output directory.
